item.name: Garlond GL-IIT Ignition Key
item.description: A thin key that ignites your Garlond GL-IIT's ceruleum engine, bringing the tiller-equipped vehicle rumbling to life.

mount.name: Garlond GL-IIT
mount.action: Summon forth your Garlond GL-IIT, a magitek vehicle equipped with a tiller, and cultivate your isle in style.
mount.description: A variant of the popular Garlond GL-II, this trike has been engineered for cultivating the land. The ceruleum-powered rotary tiller makes short work of transforming rough terrain, while the cargo tray is ideal for transporting materials and passengers both.
mount.tooltip:
This untamed isle is yours
to cultivate as you see fit.
- Tataru
